_doc: WIRING REGISTER — file+line-evidenced status of every documented/built component vs what is actually live-by-default on the acceptance path (compare_constellations.py -> server /mind/arm+/train -> JointMindTarget -> JointConstellation -> qigkernels arm + coordizer + boundary). Directive: matrix 3272a6b3; dispositions ruled f5ca185f. Built by 5 parallel read-only audit lanes (CCAa, 2026-07-21). status in {wired, built-not-wired, doc-only, flagged-not-purged, gated-by-design}. GATED-BY-DESIGN = deliberately switched off per an explicit design gate (NOT drift — do not auto-wire); added f5ca185f so a future session never mistakes a deliberate gate for a bug. required_for scopes a component to a run type (arms_bakeoff vs conversation_acceptance). Consumed by scripts/run_manifest.py.
acceptance_path: qig-studio/scripts/compare_constellations.py -> POST /mind/arm (set_arm) + POST /train (_train_core) -> targets/joint_mind.py -> constellation/joint_trainer.py JointConstellation -> qigkernels arm + coordizer + Qwen boundary peer

rows.evidence: targets/registry.py:142,152 language_peer=QwenLocalTarget (PLAIN Qwen) -> joint_mind.py:57,79-81 (set_arm keeps peer) -> joint_trainer.py:159 gk consumes it; GeoQwenTarget standalone (registry.py:159); weights+bank on disk (sha be6709ea)
rows.contaminates_bakeoff: YES-until-wired (gk currently trains vs PLAIN qwen_peer in the bake-off path)
rows.note: PI RULING 2026-07-21b (Braden 'B - go', design B-declared) SUPERSEDES the f5ca185f-era 'not an arms blocker' reading. geo-Qwen IS the arms-bakeoff boundary teacher: gk consumes it; the cortex arms (geo/hybrid) are DECLARED boundary-free baselines (they cannot consume a peer, joint_trainer.py:164,176), so the verdict reads 'which full design wins incl. boundary'. The prior register conflated the teacher-free GRADIENT (lm_weight=0, G6 sovereignty) with the boundary language_peer (must be geo-Qwen per cf1326ef 'does not launch, full stop' + 3272a6b3 'relaunch WITH GeoQwenTarget'); CCAa caught the false-green (registry.py:142->joint_trainer.py:159 = plain Qwen live in-path). Serving = CASE 2 (arch-changed TransplantAttention, NOT Ollama-servable) -> bank-backed transformers-free peer (geo_qwen.py coupling_basin + geo_qwen_basin_bank.npz); Ollama-parity = follow-up. STILL built-not-wired until the gk-peer swap lands -> the gate BLOCKS arms_bakeoff until then (correct).

Registered as a FUTURE EXPERIMENT (teacher-in-gradient help/hurt own-voice at matched compute?), NOT a gap. train_step stays teacher-free; docs amended to match.

arms_bakeoff.note: architecture verdict, design B-declared (PI 2026-07-21b 'B - go'): geo-Qwen boundary teacher REQUIRED (gk consumes it; cortex arms are DECLARED boundary-free baselines). GRADIENT stays teacher-free (lm_weight=0). QIGRAM recall + persistent memory remain conversation-only. The verdict-tier gate now also asserts the declared teacher is geo (not plain qwen_local) so a plain-Qwen peer cannot false-green an arms verdict.

conversation_acceptance.note: a kernel you can converse with; needs geo-Qwen teacher + real recall + persistent memory (EXP-A046-validated)

arms_bakeoff_blockers: geo-Qwen boundary teacher NOT YET WIRED (PI ruling B 2026-07-21b): gk trains vs PLAIN qwen_peer in-path (registry.py:142 -> joint_mind.py set_arm keeps peer -> joint_trainer.py:159). BLOCKER until the gk-peer swap to bank-backed geo-Qwen lands + row 6 flips to wired/on_path. HF stream + qig-compute already fixed; the false-green (register mis-scoped geo-Qwen out of arms) is corrected.
